helpContent: Welcome to the Messenger application. Here you can communicate with other users in real-time. To get started, simply login with your credentials and select a chat to start messaging.
deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
backendTech: Backend: Java Spring Boot 3.x with WebFlux
cacheTech: Cache: Redis for online status and pub/sub
maintenanceModeDescription: Enable maintenance mode to restrict access to the application
allowNewRegistrationsDescription: Allow new users to register for accounts
maxFileSizeDescription: Maximum file size allowed for uploads
messageRetentionDescription: Number of days to retain messages before automatic deletion
endToEndEncryptionDescription: Enable end-to-end encryption for enhanced privacy
encryptionAlgorithmDescription: Choose encryption algorithm for securing messages
encryptionKeyLengthDescription: Length of encryption keys in bits
advancedEncryptionDescription: Configure advanced encryption parameters for enhanced security
cipherSuiteDescription: Specific combination of cryptographic algorithms used for encryption
certificateManagementDescription: Manage SSL/TLS certificates for secure communications
keyExchangeDescription: Configure key exchange protocols for secure communication
hashFunctionDescription: Cryptographic hash function used for data integrity verification
securityRecommendationDescription: Recommended security configuration based on threat assessment
dataEncryptionDescription: Encrypt data both in transit and at rest
chatEncryptionDescription: Enable encryption for individual chat conversations
messageEncryptionDescription: Encrypt individual messages for enhanced privacy
fileEncryptionDescription: Encrypt files stored in the system
encryptionConfigurationDescription: Detailed configuration options for encryption system
encryptionKeyTypeDescription: Type of encryption keys to be used
encryptionProtocolDescription: Protocol used for encryption and decryption operations
tlsVersionDescription: Transport Layer Security protocol version for encrypted communications
sslVersionDescription: Secure Sockets Layer protocol version for encrypted communications
complianceDescription: Ensure compliance with security standards and regulations
securityUpdatesDescription: Automatic installation of security patches and updates
dataHandlingDescription: How data is processed, stored, and transmitted
accessControlDescription: Manage access permissions and authorization levels
auditLogsDescription: Maintain detailed logs of all system activities
incidentResponseDescription: Protocols for responding to security incidents
securityTrainingDescription: Educational resources for maintaining security best practices
encryptionHealthDescription: Overall health and effectiveness of encryption system
performanceImpactDescription: Effect of encryption on system performance
encryptionCompatibilityDescription: Compatibility with different clients and platforms
crossPlatformSupportDescription: Encryption support across different operating systems and devices
backupAndRecoveryDescription: Encryption considerations for data backup and recovery
disasterRecoveryDescription: Encryption protocols for disaster recovery procedures
keyManagementDescription: Processes for generating, storing, and managing encryption keys
keyRotationDescription: Regular replacement of encryption keys for enhanced security
keyDistributionDescription: Secure distribution of encryption keys to authorized parties
keyRevocationDescription: Process for revoking compromised or outdated encryption keys
certificateAuthorityDescription: Trusted entity that issues digital certificates for encryption
publicKeysDescription: Publicly shared encryption keys for secure communication
privateKeysDescription: Secret encryption keys kept confidential for security
symmetricEncryptionDescription: Encryption using the same key for encryption and decryption
asymmetricEncryptionDescription: Encryption using different keys for encryption and decryption
hybridEncryptionDescription: Combination of symmetric and asymmetric encryption methods
blockCiphersDescription: Encryption algorithms that operate on fixed-size blocks of data
streamCiphersDescription: Encryption algorithms that operate on continuous streams of data
hashAlgorithmsDescription: Algorithms for creating fixed-size hashes from variable-size input
digitalSignaturesDescription: Cryptographic techniques for verifying authenticity of digital documents
certificateValidationDescription: Process of verifying the authenticity of digital certificates
certificateRenewalDescription: Process for renewing expired or expiring digital certificates
certificateTrustDescription: Mechanisms for establishing trust in digital certificates
certificateChainDescription: Hierarchy of certificates from root to end-entity certificate
certificateVerificationDescription: Process of validating the authenticity and validity of certificates
certificateStorageDescription: Secure storage mechanisms for digital certificates
certificateDeploymentDescription: Process of installing certificates on systems and applications
certificateMonitoringDescription: Continuous monitoring of certificate status and validity
certificateReportingDescription: Reports on certificate status, expiration, and compliance
certificateComplianceDescription: Ensuring certificates meet regulatory and security requirements
certificateLifecycleDescription: Complete lifecycle management of digital certificates
certificateGovernanceDescription: Policies and procedures for certificate management
certificateStandardsDescription: Industry standards and best practices for certificates
certificateSecurityDescription: Security measures for protecting digital certificates
certificateMigrationDescription: Process of transferring certificates between systems
certificateIntegrationDescription: Integration of certificates with applications and services
certificateScalabilityDescription: Ability to scale certificate management with growing infrastructure
certificateEfficiencyDescription: Optimization of certificate-related processes and operations
certificateCostDescription: Financial considerations for certificate acquisition and management
certificateROIDescription: Return on investment for certificate management initiatives
windowsDomainConfigurationDescription: To configure LDAP authentication with a Windows domain controller:
windowsStep1: Open Active Directory Users and Computers
windowsStep2: Navigate to the Organizational Unit (OU) containing users
windowsStep4: Create a service account with read permissions to user data
linuxDomainConfigurationDescription: To configure LDAP authentication with a Linux OpenLDAP server:
linuxStep2: Set up directory structure and base DN
linuxStep3: Create bind user with appropriate permissions
dataRetentionPeriodDescription: Number of days to retain messages and associated data before automatic deletion
automaticDataPurgeDescription: Enable automatic purging of expired data to maintain system performance and compliance
encryptionPolicyDescription: Configure encryption requirements for different types of communications
passwordPolicyDescription: Set requirements for password strength and rotation
accessControlPolicyDescription: Define access permissions for different user roles and groups
auditLoggingDescription: Enable detailed logging of user actions and system events
dataClassificationDescription: Rules for categorizing and handling different types of information
